architecture.summary: 4 components: vskill CLI eval commands, eval content for 86+ skills, vskill-platform web editor, plugin standard. evals.json in git = source of truth, DB stores execution results only. Repos: vskill, vskill-platform, specweave.

integrations.summary: Anthropic API (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, VSKILL_EVAL_MODEL), GitHub Contents API for web editor commit-back, local HTTP server for eval view edit mode

security.summary: Web editor admin-only restricted to anton.abyzov@gmail.com, CLI uses local env vars for API keys

performance.summary: Batch generation uses concurrency=3 for rate limit safety, CLI commands are developer-facing tools with no SLA requirements

ui-ux.summary: Eval viewer shows one skill at a time. Edit mode with explicit Save button, no auto-save. Coverage table columns: Plugin, Skill, Cases, Assertions, Last Run, Status. MISSING indicator for skills without evals.json. GitHub commit shows diff preview before confirming.

edge-cases.summary: generate-all skips failures and continues, logs failures at end. Only generates for skills WITHOUT evals.json (skip existing). Schema validation on load: error and skip invalid files, no auto-fix. eval run continues on per-case LLM failures. --force flag to overwrite existing evals.json.
